Investigating

Spam message sending bots are not only against the terms of service of most social media platforms, but they can also be incredibly annoying to other users. Therefore, it is important to investigate any suspicious behavior or activity on social media platforms that could indicate the use of a spam message sending bot. This includes monitoring for large amounts of spam messages being sent from a single account, as well as analyzing the content of the messages for any potential red flags. If a spam message sending bot is detected, it should be reported to the appropriate social media platform for further action.
